name: Masked Beast Des Gardius
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>仮</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>か</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>面</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>めん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>デス・ガーディウス
desc: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must first be Special Summoned (from your hand) by Tributing 2 monsters, including at least 1 "Grand Tiki Elder" or "Melchid the Four-Face Beast". If this card is sent from the field to your GY: Target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; equip 1 "The Mask of Remnants" from your Deck to it.
mnst_eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must first be Special Summoned (from your hand) by Tributing 2 monsters, including at least 1 "Grand Tiki Elder" or "Melchid the Four-Face Beast". If this card is sent from the field to your GY: Target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; equip 1 "The Mask of Remnants" from your Deck to it.
eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must first be Special Summoned (from your hand) by Tributing 2 monsters, including at least 1 "Grand Tiki Elder" or "Melchid the Four-Face Beast". action: Places cards from Deck in Spell & Trap Zone
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
